---

# pdnd_agreements (Data Source)

Lists PDND agreements with optional filters by state, producer, consumer, e-service, or descriptor.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pdnd_agreements" "active" {
  states = ["ACTIVE"]
}

output "active_agreement_count" {
  value = length(data.pdnd_agreements.active.agreements)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `consumer_ids` (List of String) Filter by consumer UUIDs
- `descriptor_ids` (List of String) Filter by descriptor UUIDs
- `eservice_ids` (List of String) Filter by e-service UUIDs
- `producer_ids` (List of String) Filter by producer UUIDs
- `states` (List of String) Filter by agreement states

### Read-Only

- `agreements` (Attributes List) List of agreements (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--agreements))

<a id="nestedatt--agreements"></a>
### Nested Schema for `agreements`

Read-Only:

- `consumer_id` (String)
- `consumer_notes` (String)
- `created_at` (String)
- `delegation_id` (String)
- `descriptor_id` (String)
- `eservice_id` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `producer_id` (String)
- `rejection_reason` (String)
- `state` (String)
- `suspended_at` (String)
- `suspended_by_consumer` (Boolean)
- `suspended_by_platform` (Boolean)
- `suspended_by_producer` (Boolean)
- `updated_at` (String)
